scope: Excellent evidence-first workbench architecture; shared or multi-tenant production use remains conditional.

gaps.surface: workspace, artifacts, cache, and worker execution boundaries
gaps.production_boundary: AGILAB does not currently claim hard multi-tenant isolation as a shipped platform primitive.
evidence_required: cross-tenant cache and worker leakage regression tests

gaps.surface: operator identity, project permissions, and UI/API authorization
gaps.production_boundary: AGILAB can run controlled local or team workflows, but enterprise identity and RBAC remain deployment responsibilities.
evidence_required: role-based project and artifact access tests
public UI bind checks with auth/TLS evidence

gaps.surface: release, worker, and evidence store rollback
gaps.production_boundary: Release proof exists, but regulated production rollback is not claimed as a full platform guarantee.
evidence_required: evidence-store compatibility and migration rollback test

gaps.surface: model serving, audit retention, monitoring, and regulated operations
gaps.production_boundary: AGILAB is positioned as an evidence workbench, not as the sole regulated model-serving control plane.
The pickle model is constrained to a trusted resource root, but cryptographic signature verification is not yet a shipped requirement.
evidence_required: hash or signature verification before deserialization
regression test for signature mismatch refusal
